ADS8192: Gene Co-expression Network Analysis for Bulk RNA-seq Data

ADS8192-package.Rd

Provides functions to build and analyze gene co-expression networks from bulk RNA-seq data. Includes tools for selecting the most variable genes, computing pairwise gene-gene correlation matrices, and thresholding correlations into binary adjacency matrices with per-gene (node-level) statistics. Supports community detection using Louvain or walktrap algorithms with per-module summaries and global network statistics. Provides visualizations as correlation heatmaps or force-directed layouts colored by module with hub gene labels. Exports results to TSV files.

See also

Key functions:

  • prepare_expression_matrix() — prepare log-normalized matrix from a SummarizedExperiment

  • top_variable_features() — select most variable genes

  • select_random_samples() — subset to random samples

  • pairwise_corr() — compute gene-gene correlation matrix

  • build_adjacency_mat() — threshold correlations to adjacency matrix

  • build_network() — construct igraph network and compute node statistics

  • detect_network_modules() — detect gene modules via Louvain or walktrap

  • summarize_network() — summarize global network properties

  • get_hub_genes() — extract top hub genes by degree

  • plot_corr_map() — plot correlation heatmap

  • plot_network() — plot force-directed network graph

  • net_export() — export results to TSV files

Author

Maintainer: Liane Muir liane.muir@stjude.org (ORCID)
